channel.title: windows on Analyst
channel.description: Recent content in windows on Analyst

item.title: Malware Analysis Tips
item.description: In this article I’m collecting all the main tips for malware analysis. Some indicators of compromise, some common clues and etc.

item.title: OSDF conference 2020
item.description: These are my notes from OSDF con (2020). I didn’t keep the notes from all of the topics.

item.title: Positive and Negative Numbers
item.description: Intro One’s complement Two complement

item.title: Important Registry Keys
item.description: In this list I collect all the registry keys that I learned about or had experience with in the past and that are useful for forensics purposes (or may be not).

item.title: Local Authentication
item.description: This article is all about such scary terms as LSA, local authentication, SAM etc. Also, I’ve tries to highlight the updates on the implementation for different Windows versions.

item.title: Lab Setup
item.description: Analysing Traffic Dshell Installing sudo python3 -m pip install [tar_file] # option 1 pip install dshell # option 2.

item.title: BTFM
item.description: Dshell # MacOSX path to directory with pyenv (example): /Users/[user_name]/.pyenv/versions/3.8.5/envs/python3/lib/python3.8/site-packages/dshell/ decode -l # list decoders decode -d [decoder_name] # decoder info # who talked to whom decode -d ip [capture_file_name].

item.title: Calling Conventions in x86
item.description: In this article I’m giving an overview of different calling conventions with examples. Intro Consider the following code snippet:

item.title: Flags
item.description: CF ZF OF

item.title: Operations
item.description: In this article I’m describing all assembly operations that I’ve encountered myseld and also wasn’t lazy anough to put down an explanation about here.

item.title: Registers
item.description: EAX EIP EBP RSI/ESI Source Index. RSI - 64 bit, ESI - 32. RDI/EDI Destination Index.

item.title: Crackme Algorithm
item.description: Look at the strings fs strings and f in radare2 or rabin -zz Find xrefs for the strings of interest axt @ str.

item.title: From Src to Binary
item.description: To read https://www.airs.com/blog/archives/38

item.title: Assembly Cheatsheet
item.description: Lorem markdownum aequalis strigis. Saetigeri iubeas, vultu huic alvum nondum de obside ut laniavit arbor palmis, cum quin.

item.title: Assembly Intro
item.description: In this article I’m giving a quick dive-in into assembly. It’s very simple and very difficult at the same time.

item.title: Mobile Toolkit
item.description: Debuggers gdb Other IDA Pro [Hopper Disassembler](/docs/toolkit/general/reverse-toolkit/#hopper disassembler) Static code analysis IDA Pro Hopper Disassembler radare2 Utilities Activity Analysis Jailbreaking/Rooting Something Desciption

item.title: Reverse Engineering Toolkit
item.description: Debuggers OllyDbg One of the veterans. Install: Common commands: Keywords: Analogues: x64dbg, radare2 **Possible issues: **

item.title: Live Acquisition Steps
item.description: Prerequisites USB with portable exes? Live USB Remote? RAM acquisition tools Video RAM Acquisition Steps RAM Acquisition is the first priority since it’s the volatile memory.

item.title: Offline Acquisition Steps
item.description: Prerequisites Live USB/CD? Process Connect external HDD or SSD Lauch some forensic distribution (for example, Paladin).

item.title: Windows Forensics Plan
item.description: Plan for Windows Forensics Done (Udemy watched, tools installed and used, conclusions made) is bolded:
